title: Yeah, I Like This
description: A mod that enhances vanilla by adding random, unrelated things, like blocks, food and armor
body:
Yeah, I like this – it's a mod that adds things that stay within the vanilla style. The mod adds blocks, armor, potions, and all the other cool things!

  1.0.0 version
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
 
Amethyst Gear: A replacement for Netherite — it has lower durability, but tools deal more damage and the armor is slightly stronger.

**Glass Blocks:** Glass slabs, doors, and trapdoors, as well as framed glass made with different metals.

**Salt:** A new ore and decorative blocks.

**Potions:** Haste, Glowing, Wither, Hunger, Blindness, Mining fatigue and Nausea.

**Food:** Echpochmaks, various cookies (which give short-term effects), and golden food (golden potato and golden echpochmak — they work like golden apples but grant different effects).


 1.0.1 update (bug fixes)

Added animation to Sparkling amethyst item

Reduced Amethyst ruins generation and rebalanced loot tables

Fixed names of salt blocks

Fixed bug with transperency of stained glass block slabs


 1.0.2 (small additions)

Redesigned the texture of the Salt Crystal 

Added animation for the Golden Potato and the Glowing Berry Cookie

Added a Sparkling Amethyst block

Rebalanced the spawn rate of Rock Salt

Fixed craft of Amethyst Upgade

   1.1.0 update

Added Magmatic Armor: an upgrade to Netherite armor, wearing the full set grants Fire Resistance.

Magmatic Upgrade and Magmatic Core: ingredients used to craft Magmatic Armor.

New Magmatic Structure: this structure contains Magmatic Upgrades and has Wither Skeletons in there.

   1.2.0 update
   
Added vertical planks, along with stairs and slabs made from them.

Added mosaic variants for all wood types (like bamboo).
</details>

The mod is planned to be further developed, but for now it's only available for version 1.20.1 (I might make a port for 1.19.2, but it will be Forge-only). There's also a plan to port the mod to 1.21.1 using NeoForge.

You're allowed to use this mod in modpacks and to port it to Fabric (or other mod loaders, but only if you include a link to the original mod).

 Localization:

ru_ru - IseDenL_FsT

I hope you enjoy the mod — have fun playing!
